bio.name: Jatin Kumar
bio.title: Video Editor & Motion Designer
bio.tagline: Crafting cinematic visuals with precision and passion.
bio.about: I am a professional video editor specializing in storytelling, motion graphics, and polished post-production workflows. I help brands and creators bring their ideas to life with clean edits, dynamic pacing, and modern design.

projects.title: Shell E-Learning Platform Promotional Video
projects.description: Academic promotional video for Shell E-Learning Platform, showcasing online AI-integrated courses and educational features.

experience.description: Delivering high-quality video content, editing, motion graphics, and color grading for clients across industries.
highlights: Delivered 50+ brand videos and social campaigns.
Maintained 5-star client rating for consistent on-time delivery.
Optimized workflow using Premiere Pro, After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve, Illustrator.

softwares.name: Adobe After Effects
softwares.description: Motion graphics and visual effects compositing.

videos.title: BMW M4 Simple and Clean Edit.
videos.description: Client's demands: Video upscaling, simple yet clean edit, no fancy transitions or effects.
